ichimoku_cloud.usage: Primary indicator for resistance/support and trend direction. Uses cloud (kumo) thickness as resistance strength indicator. Cloud twist (nejire) used as entry signal. Red cloud = bearish resistance, Green cloud = bullish support.
ichimoku_cloud.settings: Default Ichimoku settings (9/26/52). Referred to simply as '雲' (kumo/cloud).
key_observations: 4H cloud used for short-term trend assessment
8H cloud used as key fractal comparison overlay
Cloud twist (ねじれ) as timing signal for trend change
Cloud entry: 'If price enters cloud, buy on pullback after becoming a wick'
Cloud thickness = resistance strength

SMA100.usage: Key support/resistance on 4H, 8H, daily. Most frequently referenced SMA.

SMA200.usage: Major trend indicator on 8H. 'Flattening = consolidation/squeeze signal'

key_observations: SMA100 and SMA200 are his primary SMAs
SMA100 on daily = year-end 2022 key reference (white line)
SMA100-200 range used as 'box range' for breakout trading
SMA25+100 combo on 4H for USDJPY analysis
SMA200 horizontal = consolidation signal (煮詰まり)

macd.usage: Primarily for divergence detection, NOT for signal line crosses. Combined with candlestick patterns for entries.
key_observations: MACD divergence + resistance/support flip = high confidence trade
Divergence used for PROFIT TAKING, not for contrarian entries
When used for contrarian: must combine with candlestick confirmation

gmma.usage: Short-term scalping tool. 5-minute GMMA for 'sell the bounce' after sharp drops.
gmma.settings: Standard GMMA (Guppy Multiple Moving Average) - 12 EMAs total. Short-term group: 3,5,8,10,12,15. Long-term group: 30,35,40,45,50,60. Displayed as red (long) and green (short) ribbon.
key_observations: Used exclusively on 5-min chart
Post-crash bounce selling strategy: 'First bounce sell usually works, second bounce is risky'
When GMMA ribbon is spread wide = strong trend, sell bounces to ribbon

tars.usage: Consolidation/squeeze indicator. Called '煮詰まりインジケータ (TARS)'. Used on 8H chart to detect range compression before breakout.
tars.settings: Unknown custom settings. Name suggests it may be a TradingView custom indicator.
key_observations: Used on 8H timeframe
Identifies consolidation before breakout
Combined with channel position analysis

open_interest.usage: Core decision-making data. OI increase/decrease combined with price direction is his PRIMARY edge.
key_observations: Price up + OI down = short cover (not real buying, will reverse)
Price down + OI up = new shorts being added (dangerous, reversal possible)
OI explosion = position crowding = liquidation cascade imminent
Active OI tracking by exchange (Binance, Bybit, BitMEX separately)
OI increase during range = fuel accumulation for breakout
FTX OI 'heavily piling on' = do not fight the flow
1B OI threshold = 'danger zone'
Leverage ratio monitoring (Bybit)

funding_rate.usage: Sentiment gauge. FR(+) = longs dominant, FR(-) = shorts dominant. Used alongside OI for positioning.
key_observations: FR direction used to confirm OI positioning
Extreme FR = crowded positioning = reversal signal

liquidation_data.usage: Aggregated liquidations monitored for cascade events. Long liquidation cascades = buy opportunity after settling.
key_observations: Large liquidation + OI decrease = forced selling exhaustion
Post-liquidation push = short-term reversal opportunity

spot_buy_sell_ratio.usage: Spot vs derivatives buy/sell ratio for confirming real demand vs speculative activity

fibonacci.usage: Half retracement (50%) is the single most important level. References Gann: 'Gann considered 50% the most important level.'
key_observations: 50% retracement is danjer's most referenced level (12 mentions)
Used on daily, weekly, 3D, 12H timeframes
Fibonacci drawn from swing high to swing low
0.5 level used as both entry and invalidation point

by_frequency.notes: Most referenced. Gann's most important level.
Signature technique. Overlay past price structure on current.
Center line is 'ironclad' (鉄壁の中央ライン). Trades from channel edges.
DANGEROUS in BTC: 'BTC ascending triangle breakout never works well'
Core concept. Always looks for flip confirmation.
Used in both directions. Combined with neckline analysis.
Detected via SMA200 flattening or TARS indicator.

by_frequency.pattern: Adam & Eve bottom (アダムイブ底)
by_frequency.notes: Sharp V-bottom followed by rounded bottom. Eve = reverse H&S.
Descending wedge = bullish breakout after volatility compression.
Sakata Goho. 'Post-crash falling three methods is devastatingly effective.'
Sakata Goho. 4 candles without retrace = weak selling pressure.

by_frequency.pattern: Short selling structure (空売りの構造)
by_frequency.notes: Referenced from a Japanese trading book.
Market indecision signal. Inside bar after doji = squeeze.

fractal_analysis.description: danjer's SIGNATURE technique. Overlays past BTC price patterns on current chart using TradingView's 'Bar Pattern' tool.
method: 1. Visually scan chart for similar patterns
2. Use TradingView Bar Pattern tool to copy the historical section
3. Overlay on current price and project future movement
4. Cross-reference with other indicators (OI, cloud, channels)

historical_periods_referenced.used_for: CME gap close + slight high update then weekly bearish close

fractal_analysis.key_insight: Fractals work best when combined with Ichimoku cloud similarity and channel position

by_frequency.usage: Primary analysis timeframe. Trend direction, major S/R.
Main trading timeframe. Patterns, cloud, channels.
Cloud analysis, SMA200, TARS, fractal overlays. Unique to danjer.
Short-term patterns, trendline breaks, OI analysis.
Major structure, descending triangles, wedges, cycle analysis.
Macro structure, half retracements, candle body analysis.
Scalping with GMMA. Sell-the-bounce after crashes.

timeframes.unique_observation: 8H timeframe is unusually prominent - not commonly used by other traders. danjer uses it as his 'sweet spot' between 4H and daily.

Coinglass.usage: OI, Funding Rate, Liquidations, Leverage Ratio

orderbook_tool.description: Desktop application showing 1m+15m BitMEX charts, orderbook (BitMEX/Bitfinex/Binance), volume checker, FR, OI/OV. Similar to TradingLite.
orderbook_tool.usage: 1-minute execution and orderbook depth analysis. Free installable PC tool.

tools_and_platforms.mobile: TradingView mobile app (screenshot from iPhone visible)
tools_and_platforms.exchange_for_trading: BitMEX confirmed (position screenshots showing lots, pips)

channels.colors: Red/pink for descending channels, yellow for key trendlines
channels.center_line: Channel center line is called '鉄壁の中央ライン' (ironclad center line). Key resistance/support.
channels.trading_approach: Swing trade from channel edges. Center = avoid positions or scalp only.

horizontal_lines.colors: Yellow = key S/R levels, White = range boundaries, Green = support zones
horizontal_lines.zones: Uses range boxes (rectangles) to mark consolidation zones

annotations.style: Heavy use of Japanese text annotations directly on chart
annotations.arrows: White/large arrows for expected price direction
annotations.labels: Blue labels with white text for key concepts (レジライン, サポライン, etc.)

projected_moves.style: White/blue zigzag lines showing expected future price path
projected_moves.color_coding: Red zigzag = bearish scenario, Blue = bullish scenario

common_setups: Current vs Historical (side by side for fractal comparison)

core_principles: Fractal analysis is the primary edge - 'フラクタルしか勝たん' (Only fractals win)
OI/FR analysis is critical - never fight the flow when OI is exploding
Half retracement (50%) is the most important Fibonacci level
BTC ascending triangle breakouts are historically dangerous (opposite of textbook)
Channel center line is the strongest S/R in a channel
Post-crash: sell the bounce with GMMA on 5min. First bounce works, second is risky.
Falling three methods (下げ三法) after crash is extremely reliable
Volatility compression (煮詰まり) = breakout imminent. Wait for direction, then follow.
Dow Theory: BTC trend reversal confirmed only above $25,000 (in 2022 context)
Cut losses fast, rebuy at better levels rather than holding
Candle body close confirmation before acting (not just wicks)
risk_management: Stop loss placed at candle body close below level (not wick)
Position cutting on first sign of plan invalidation
unique_insights: BTC ascending triangle breakout = usually fails. Learned this multiple times in 2022.
Short covering (OI decrease during price increase) = not real buying, will reverse
New shorts piling in (OI increase during price decrease) = liquidation cascade setup
Exchange-specific OI matters - FTX OI was heavy before collapse
Leverage ratio by exchange tracks speculative excess
Astrology/lunar cycles occasionally referenced (蟹座満月 in Jan 2022 tweet)

key_price_levels_2022.significance: Diamond pattern target / S/R flip zone
